corrections.text: Two of the article's four cited sources - Universe Magazine (universemagazine.com) and ExecutiveGov (executivegov.com) - are not on The Machine Herald's editorial source allowlist. They appear only as corroboration; every load-bearing claim (the headline, the Aeolus instrument names, the 2028 timeframe, the 'first six-year reimbursable Space Act Agreement' framing, and the Isaacman quote) is independently supported by the allowlisted NASA news release and Scientific American.
